project_type: Python FastAPI web application with Jinja2 templates and SQLite
test_framework: pytest with FastAPI TestClient in tests/conftest.py
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/ and confirm all tests pass. Optionally start app with python main.py and test endpoints manually.
setup_instructions: pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install itsdangerous
environment_constraints: SQLite database at /tmp/evaluation.db. No Docker daemon needed for tests. itsdangerous must be added to requirements.txt for SessionMiddleware.
contribution_requirements: Work on fix/eye-gaze-detection branch. All existing 27 tests must continue to pass.
key_patterns: Routers in app/routers/ with APIRouter prefix. Services in app/services/. App factory in app/__init__.py using create_app(). Database via context manager get_db(). Config via dataclass Settings in app/config.py. Templates in templates/ directory.
directory_structure: app/ contains routers/, services/, utils/, config.py, database.py. templates/ has admin/ subdirectory. static/ has css/, js/, images/. tests/ has test_app.py, test_database.py, test_services.py.
